name: Atlassian
h1: Build AI Agents That Work with Atlassian
metaTitle: Build Atlassian AI Agents with DocsBot Skill Builder
metaDescription: Create DocsBot AI agents that use Atlassian data and workflows to resolve support questions, assist employees, trigger actions, and summarize work safely.
intro: Atlassian helps teams manage projects, issues, documentation, and collaboration across tools like Jira, Confluence, and Trello. With DocsBot Skill Builder, you can describe the Atlassian workflow you want in plain language and have DocsBot create a secure reusable Skill for a support agent or internal AI assistant. That lets your AI agent answer questions, look up live work data, prepare handoffs, and take approved actions inside Atlassian without making setup feel technical.
supportUseCases: Let a customer-facing DocsBot agent check Jira issue status, priority, assignee, or recent updates while answering product support questions in chat or tickets.
Use the agent to create a Jira support issue from a customer conversation, capture the right context, and confirm the handoff back to the customer.
Have the agent search Confluence for troubleshooting steps, policy pages, or release notes and summarize the most relevant answer for the customer.
Enable the agent to add notes, labels, or customer-provided details to an existing Atlassian record when your support workflow allows approved updates.
Let the agent prepare an escalation summary from the customer conversation and attach the key facts to a Jira ticket for human follow-up.
internalUseCases: Employees can chat with a private DocsBot agent to find Jira issues, Confluence pages, or Trello work items and get a fast summary without switching tools.
Support, success, and operations teams can ask the agent to create or update Atlassian records as part of documented workflows while the agent follows scoped permissions and approval rules.
Team members can use the agent in Slack or Microsoft Teams to prepare incident summaries, project status updates, or backlog snapshots from Atlassian data.
New employees can ask the agent to walk them through internal SOPs stored in Confluence and complete related workflow steps across Atlassian systems.
Managers and coordinators can chat with the agent to gather cross-project updates, identify blockers, and generate handoff notes for the next team.
whatYouCanBuild: A support agent that checks Jira ticket status and explains the latest update to customers.
An AI assistant that creates Jira issues from chat conversations with required fields prefilled.
A DocsBot Skill that searches Confluence and returns concise troubleshooting answers with source context.
An internal agent that summarizes open work across Jira projects for team leads.
A workflow assistant that prepares escalation notes and attaches them to Atlassian issues.
A private AI agent that guides employees through Confluence-based SOPs and next steps.

howItWorks.title: Describe the outcome
howItWorks.description: You tell DocsBot Skill Builder what you want the Atlassian agent to do, such as checking issue status, creating tickets, searching Confluence, or preparing escalations, and it translates that goal into a working Skill design.

howItWorks.title: Skill Builder designs it securely
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder figures out the required Atlassian connection details, defines secure configuration values, protects and proxies secrets through runtime settings, and keeps credentials out of chats and Skill content by default.

howItWorks.title: Permissions stay scoped
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder limits the Skill to the minimum Atlassian actions, records, users, and workflows needed, and it adds approval boundaries for sensitive updates or workflow triggers when appropriate.

howItWorks.title: The Skill is tested
howItWorks.description: DocsBot’s automated testing agent runs imagined customer support and internal team scenarios, checks for bugs, weak instructions, missing safeguards, or workflow gaps, and reports what should improve.

howItWorks.title: DocsBot improves and deploys
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder feeds those test findings into an automated self-improvement loop, refines the Skill, and helps publish it to the right customer-facing or internal DocsBot agent for real use.

faq.question: How can I build an AI agent that works with Atlassian?
faq.answer: With DocsBot Skill Builder, you describe the Atlassian workflow you want in plain language, and DocsBot designs a reusable Skill that can look up data, summarize records, create handoffs, and take approved actions safely.

faq.question: Can a DocsBot support agent use Atlassian data during customer chats?
faq.answer: Yes, a DocsBot support agent can use Atlassian as a connected system to retrieve issue details, search documentation, create tickets, and summarize status while responding to customer messages or helpdesk tickets.

faq.question: What Atlassian workflows can an internal AI assistant automate for employees?
faq.answer: An internal DocsBot agent can help employees find Jira, Confluence, or Trello information, prepare project summaries, create or update approved records, and guide teams through SOPs or escalation workflows.

faq.question: Can an AI agent create Jira issues from support conversations?
faq.answer: Yes, DocsBot can be configured to turn customer conversations into structured Jira issues with the right context, while using scoped permissions and optional approval boundaries for record creation.

faq.question: Can DocsBot search Confluence and answer questions from those pages?
faq.answer: Yes, a DocsBot Skill can search Confluence content, pull the most relevant information, and return a concise answer or summary to customers or employees with the proper access controls in place.

faq.question: How does DocsBot keep Atlassian connections secure?
faq.answer: Skill Builder defines secure configuration values, handles authentication safely, proxies secrets through protected runtime settings, and keeps credentials out of conversations and generated Skill content.

brand.title: Atlassian Corporation
brand.description: Atlassian is a global software company dedicated to enhancing team collaboration and productivity. With a robust portfolio that includes popular tools like Jira, Confluence, and Trello, Atlassian helps over 300,000 customers streamline their project management and issue tracking. Employing a diverse team of over 10,000 professionals, Atlassian is committed to building innovative software that empowers teams to work together effectively. The company believes in the transformative power of teamwork to create a more open, authentic, and inclusive world, driving them to continuously develop next-generation solutions that unlock the full potential of teams. Whether organizing tasks, facilitating discussions, or completing shared projects, Atlassian's tools are designed to foster collaboration and creativity among teams worldwide.
brand.slogan: Unleash team potential with Atlassian's collaboration tools.
